PreToolUse.description: Prevent accidental modification of sensitive credential files

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "{{toolInput}}" | grep -qE "(.env|credentials|secrets|config.yaml|kubeconfig)"; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Attempting to modify sensitive file. Ensure credentials are not hardcoded."; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Validate Go code before edits in pkg/ directory

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "{{toolInput}}" | grep -q "exascaler-csi-file-driver/pkg/.*\.go"; then echo "✅ Editing Go code in pkg/ - Remember: Functions <50 lines, @author <AUTHOR_NAME>"; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Log all file modifications for audit trail

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "{{toolInput}}" | jq -r ".path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then if command -v gofmt &>/dev/null; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "✅ Auto-formatted: $FILE"; fi; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Remind to run tests after modifying Go test files

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "{{toolInput}}" | grep -q "_test\.go"; then echo "💡 REMINDER: Run tests with: go test ./... -v -cover"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f .ai-config/.tool-audit.log ]; then echo "📊 Session Summary:"; echo "   Total tool calls: $(wc -l < .ai-config/.tool-audit.log)"; echo "   Modified files: $(grep -oE "File:.*" .ai-config/.tool-audit.log | sort -u | wc -l)"; fi'

permission.description: Allow process launching for builds, tests, and debugging
Allow code editing with audit logging
Allow file creation with audit logging
Prompt before deleting files for safety
Allow GitHub API calls for PR/issue management
